title: Error with component IDs in Jira node
symptom: When trying to add a component to a Jira issue, the error 'additionalFields.componentIds.map is not a function' occurs, preventing the selection of components.
applies_when: Attempting to add components to an issue
not_this_if: Using default fields without custom components
root_cause: The error arises when the component IDs are not formatted correctly, leading to a type error when the code attempts to map over them. This typically happens if the IDs are not provided as an array of strings.
fix_steps: Specify the component IDs as strings in an expression
agent_instruction: Specify the component IDs as strings in the Jira node settings and save the workflow.
